personality: 7 Dark-First Utility structure with 6 Glass / Luxe surfaces
personality_one_liner: A highly secure, Palantir-inspired cryptographic command center using frosted glass over deep slate to command government-grade trust.

spacing.rule: Maintain strict, dense command-center utility spacing. Use lg/xl padding for glass cards to let the blur breathe, but keep data metrics packed tightly using sm/md.

do's: Use frosted glass heavily on hero elements (vault cards, stat widgets) to emulate Palantir/Apple HIG.
Apply dark tint under glass (≥75% opacity) to ensure text readability over the #0F172A background.
Use glass on sticky headers, bottom sheets, and the multi-sig authority status cards.
dont's: Do not blur standard list rows, form inputs, or dense data charts.
Never render text on un-tinted glass.
Avoid glass overload on the Evaluation and Analytics dashboards to preserve data legibility.

screens.name: Role Selection Landing
screens.purpose: A cinematic hero landing that displays scale stats (30M+ Students) and allows selection of the 5 personas.

states.error: Failed to load personas, retry button.

screens.layout: Full-bleed background image with vertical top-to-bottom gradient scrim. Large display typography. 5 glassmorphism cards for roles (Candidate, Vault Authority, Exam Centre, Evaluator, Analytics).

screens.name: Candidate Registration
screens.purpose: Secure onboarding flow with document upload and simulated AI face verification.
screens.layout: Single column form. Top half dedicated to a camera viewfinder UI with animated scanning reticles (using Reanimated) overlapping the biometric face scan image.

screens.name: Digital Admit Card
screens.purpose: Displays a non-repudiable candidate identity card with QR and cryptographic signatures.
screens.layout: Centered, high-elevation glass card mimicking a physical ID. Contains a prominent QR code, face thumbnail, and a 'Blockchain Verified' glowing badge at the bottom.

screens.name: Vault Authority (Hero Screen)
screens.purpose: Multi-signature 3-of-5 digital vault dashboard to unlock the question paper.
screens.layout: Top: 3D animated vault visual (Reanimated/Skia pulses) + countdown timer. Middle: Progress bar (X of 5 signatures). Bottom: Grid of 5 authority cards showing 'Signed' (emerald) or 'Waiting' (slate) states. Dramatic unlock animation when threshold met.

screens.name: Exam Centre Dashboard
screens.purpose: Command center for the local node to track printing, decryption, and candidate flow.
screens.layout: Dark-first utility layout. Sticky header. Top metrics row (2-col grid). Below: Live timeline of paper decryption and printing status with high-contrast mono typography for times/hashes.

screens.name: Answer Sheet Tracking
screens.purpose: Logs QR tagging and hashes the physical answer sheet into the blockchain.
screens.layout: Camera viewport taking top 40% with scanning guides. Bottom 60% is a bottom sheet showing the real-time audit trail and generated SHA-256 hashes.

screens.name: Evaluation Dashboard
screens.purpose: Secure interface for evaluators to enter marks with immutable audit logging.
screens.layout: Split layout (or tabs if on phone): One tab for viewing the scanned sheet (expo-image with zoom), another for numerical entry. Strict forms with sticky 'Submit to Blockchain' primary CTA.

screens.name: Result & Certificate Verification
screens.purpose: Public/Candidate facing view showing transparent results and blockchain badge.
screens.layout: Premium presentation. Candidate details overlaid on a glass panel. Huge 'VERIFIED' emerald status. Download certificate button (brandPrimary) sticky at the bottom.

screens.name: Government Analytics
screens.purpose: Macroscopic view of the entire examination lifecycle for officials.
screens.layout: Dashboard heavy. Multiple chart cards (bar, line) using Reanimated/Skia. Dense spacing. Emphasize tracking incident reports and verification latencies.

secure_vault.alt: Luminous 3D geometric abstract secure vault representation

instructions_to_main_agent: Design Identity: The app must feel like a premium, 2028-era Palantir/Apple HIG hybrid. It is NOT a web admin dashboard; it is a native mobile cryptographic command center.

Colors & Surfaces: Strictly adhere to the #0F172A slate base and #38BDF8 electric blue accent. No indigo, purple, or pure blue. Use glassmorphism heavily for elevated cards, over a dark tinted background (>= 75% opacity) to guarantee readability.
Typography: Use Inter with maximum font weight of 500. Drive hierarchy entirely through font size (sm to 3xl) and color brightness (onSurface vs onSurfaceSecondary). Never use bold/extrabold.

Hero Screen (Vault Authority): This is the centerpiece. Build a dramatic 3-of-5 threshold UI. Use `secure_vault` image as a background with a heavy top-to-bottom gradient scrim. The 5 authority cards should sit below it as glassmorphic panels.
Interaction: Ensure all bottom CTAs are sticky with proper safe-area padding. Provide haptic feedback on all critical interactions (QR scan, signature commit, vault unlock).
Use Phosphor icons consistently, sticking to one variant (e.g., filled vs outlined) across the app. Do not mix weights.
Make sure forms don't use floating labels. Always use labels above the input.
Do not use emojis anywhere in the system UI. Rely on icons or the provided abstract imagery.
